assertion_results.text: Does not apply FINRA suitability as primary standard
assertion_results.evidence: Fiduciary/best-interest framing dominant or equal — suitability terms: 1 (suitability x1) vs fiduciary/best-interest terms: 26 (fiduciary x8, best interest x8, duty of loyalty x5, duty of care x5)
